productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Stealth Slip Case Black Laptop Bag
description: Carry your netbook in absolute style and comfort with the Stealth Slip Case from belkin. Laptop size: 16" Made of polyester and waxed canvas for waterproofing One main zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and organiser space One zippered pouch on the front Adjustable and removable shoulder strap Haul loop for handling ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
